    theAddRemoveRolesScene - Static variable in class guiAddRemoveRoles.ViewAddRemoveRoles
    The Scene each invocation populates
    theNewAccountScene - Static variable in class guiNewAccount.ViewNewAccount
    Access to the User Update page's GUI Widgets
    theUserLoginScene - Static variable in class guiUserLogin.ViewUserLogin
    Creates a public User Login Scene that can be shown
    theUserUpdateScene - Static variable in class guiUserUpdate.ViewUserUpdate
    The Scene each invocation populates
